markdown:
#  Configure the Number of Change Order Tiers on a Project Financials Tool 
###### Which tool do you want to configure?
[Client Contracts: 1](https://support.procore.com/products/online/user-guide/project-level/client-contracts/tutorials/configure-the-number-of-client-contract-change-order-tiers)
[Commitments:](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/configure-the-number-of-commitment-change-order-tiers)
[Funding: 2](https://support.procore.com/products/online/user-guide/project-level/funding/tutorials/configure-the-number-of-funding-change-order-tiers)
[Prime Contracts:](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/configure-the-number-of-prime-contract-change-order-tiers)
* * *
1 The Client Contracts tool is only available to Procore customers in the United States who have implemented the Procore for Specialty Contractors point-of-view-dictionary. See [What tool names and terms are different in Procore for general contractors, owners, and specialty contractors?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-tool-names-and-terms-are-different-in-procore-for-general-contractors-owners-and-specialty-contractors)
2 The Funding tool is only available to Procore customers in the United States who have implemented the Procore for Owners point-of-view-dictionary. See [What tool names and terms are different in Procore for general contractors, owners, and specialty contractors?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-tool-names-and-terms-are-different-in-procore-for-general-contractors-owners-and-specialty-contractors)

  * [Configure Settings: Change Orders](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/change-orders-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-change-orders)
title: Configure the Number of Change Order Tiers on a Project Financials Tool
